text: The Week 10 summary is up and it confirms one important live-build change: the modal now labels the total as `SANITY` and reports `-5` instead of the old flattened `HAPPINESS 0`. There’s still a smaller audit wrinkle to record, though: the visible line items only add to `-10`, so the courier decline’s likely `+5` sanity effect appears to be omitted from the breakdown even while the total is now correct.

I have the authoritative Week 10 close and enough evidence to update the workflow state. I’m writing the new canonical slice record, rolling the checkpoint forward in the audit docs, and refreshing `run-state.json` so the next fresh-context slice resumes from the Week 10 summary.

The workflow files are patched. I’m doing a quick readback on the updated state and logs now to make sure the next-slice checkpoint, Week 10 telemetry, and the summary-fix observation all landed cleanly before I close the slice.

I found one stale handoff in the persona log: an older Week 9 follow-up still says to watch Week 10. I’m cleaning that up so the compact audit log doesn’t point the next slice at the wrong checkpoint.

Completed one bounded Phase 11 slice for Persona A and stopped at the Week 10 turn summary.

Week 10 resumed from the saved Week 9 checkpoint with no opening event, hit `Shady Fixer Courier Job` on entry to Labor Sector, took the Safe Grinder decline branch, then still completed the full `travel + Work Shift x3 + home` baseline. The authoritative close is `₡1188 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 60% / Sanity 20%`.

The live build confirms the out-of-band summary fix: the modal now shows `SANITY -5` instead of the old `HAPPINESS 0`. A smaller detail bug still appears present: the visible line items sum to `-10`, so the courier decline’s likely `+5` sanity effect seems omitted even though the total is correct.
